steps.name: source-class-selection-and-authorization-boundary
steps.summary: SBI1 added scripts/source_class_selection.py, tests/test_source_class_selection.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-sbi1-source-class-selection.md. It selects interpretive_accounting_material using kasb-interpretation-material and fss-accounting-inquiry as the first controlled source-body lane, with authorization not present and implementation limited to synthetic_body_only.

steps.name: source-body-policy-record
steps.summary: SBI2 added scripts/source_policy_record.py, tests/test_source_policy_record.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-sbi2-source-body-policy-record.md. It fixes the interpretive lane policy as synthetic_body_only, supporting_interpretation, interpretive authority, synthetic_short_sections chunking, and no live fetch, embeddings, public body commits, or K-IFRS primary override.

steps.name: synthetic-body-parser-and-chunker
steps.summary: SBI3 added scripts/synthetic_body_parser_chunker.py, tests/test_synthetic_body_parser_chunker.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-sbi3-synthetic-body-parser-chunker.md. It converts a short synthetic interpretive fixture into 3 public-safe chunks with supporting_interpretation citation role and interpretive authority, without live fetch, OCR, embedding, body cache, or K-IFRS primary override.
